title: Oral Surgeons' Toolkit: 8 Herbal Tinctures for Gum Pain Relief
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures have been used for centuries to help with gum pain. The plant contains compounds like aloe-emodin, aloin, and vitamins A, C, and E, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. These compounds help to reduce swelling and pain in the gums by blocking the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause inflammation. The aloe also contains antibacterial properties, which help to prevent infections that can cause gum pain.  If ...
